# TEIKOS

> TEIKOS is scheduling infrastructure for AI voice agents and AI voice receptionists. Atomic hold-confirm booking, real-time availability, zero double-bookings. Integrates with Vapi, Retell AI, n8n, and any HTTP webhook.

TEIKOS solves the infrastructure gap in the voice AI stack: platforms like Vapi and Retell handle voice/LLM/telephony, but scheduling requires a source of truth. TEIKOS provides database-locked appointment booking via a tool-router API.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.teikos.io/): Product overview, pricing, FAQ
- [Documentation index](https://www.teikos.io/docs): All guides
- [Onboarding hub](https://www.teikos.io/docs/onboarding): Pick User, Pro, or Agency path
- [User guide (Free)](https://www.teikos.io/docs/onboarding/user): Business scheduling setup
- [Pro guide](https://www.teikos.io/docs/onboarding/pro): Voice agent integration setup
- [Agency guide](https://www.teikos.io/docs/onboarding/agency): Multi-client voice AI management
- [Integration setup (Pro)](https://www.teikos.io/docs/getting-started): Provision integrations
- [Tools Reference](https://www.teikos.io/docs/tools-reference): API tools

## Integrations

- [Vapi + TEIKOS](https://www.teikos.io/integrations/vapi): Voice agent scheduling for Vapi
- [Retell AI + TEIKOS](https://www.teikos.io/integrations/retell): Phone agent scheduling for Retell
- [n8n + TEIKOS](https://www.teikos.io/integrations/n8n): Workflow automation integration
- [Webhook / HTTP](https://www.teikos.io/integrations/webhook): Universal integration for any platform

## Integration playbooks (full docs)

- [Vapi playbook](https://www.teikos.io/docs/integrations/vapi)
- [Retell playbook](https://www.teikos.io/docs/integrations/retell)
- [n8n playbook](https://www.teikos.io/docs/integrations/n8n)
- [Webhook / HTTP playbook](https://www.teikos.io/docs/integrations/webhook-http)

## Topics covered in documentation

- AI voice agent scheduling and appointment booking
- AI voice receptionist backend / scheduling layer
- Preventing voice agent double-bookings and hallucinated appointments
- Vapi, Retell, n8n, Make, Zapier webhook integrations
- Agency multi-client voice agent management
- Business facts for voice agents
- Agent Lab (simulation/testing)
- Roles: Free (User), Pro, Agency
- Troubleshooting integration auth and slot conflicts
